title: trinia glauca subsp. dufourii
intro: Trinia glauca subsp. dufourii is a subspecies of the Trinia glauca plant, a species of flowering plant in the carrot family. It is native to certain regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Trinia glauca subsp. dufourii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
